evals.prompt: Check the latest OpenClaw auth docs before we change anything.
evals.expected_output: Uses the tool-priority ladder (first available of Firecrawl/Exa/Perplexity/Jina/context7, else WebFetch) to fetch the canonical OpenClaw auth doc URLs and reports findings with source links.
expectations: Selects an available MCP search/scrape tool, falling back to WebFetch/WebSearch only if none are connected
References the canonical OpenClaw documentation URL map rather than guessing URLs

evals.prompt: Is firecrawl required to look up OpenClaw documentation in this plugin?
evals.expected_output: Explains the fallback ladder: prefer an enabled MCP tool (Firecrawl first), but built-in WebFetch/WebSearch is the always-available fallback when no MCP search tool is connected.
